{{template config_path="design/email/header_template"}}

{{trans "Hi %1," $vendor.getName()}}

{{trans "Your Seller Verification #%1 has expired on %2." $vendorVerification.inc_id $vendorVerification.to_date }}

{{trans "You can re-verify your seller account at:"}}
{{var verificationReviewUrl}}

{{template config_path="design/email/footer_template"}}
